title: Wing Commander Collectible Trading Card Game
summary: The Wing Commander Collectible Trading Card Game is a collectible card game based on the Wing Commander video games by Chris Roberts, published by Mag Force 7.
text:
The Wing Commander Collectible Trading Card Game is a collectible card game based on the Wing Commander video games by Chris Roberts, published by Mag Force 7.

Development
Wing Commander Collectible Trading Card Game was designed by Don Perrin.

Reviews
Inquest Gamer #9
The Duelist #8
